description: A delicate watercolor depicts the famous Bridge of Sighs in Venice, an enclosed limestone bridge spanning a narrow canal between two buildings. The ornate Baroque arch features carved decorative elements along its upper edge. Below, the green water of the canal reflects the surrounding facades, and a gondola rests in the shadows. A second bridge is visible further down the canal. The buildings rise tall on either side, their plaster walls rendered in warm ochres and pale yellows. The artist's signature and a French inscription appear at the bottom of the sheet.
